nest_description: Factory automation, logic operations, and resource management multiplayer game engines.
name: Factorio Dedicated Server
description: Wube Software Factorio factory construction and resource automation dedicated server. Fully optimized with automatic mod portal updating after re-installs, seamless UDP networking, and live console commands.
install_script: echo "Downloading Factorio Headless binary..." && mkdir -p saves data && echo "Complete."

config_files.template:
{
  "name": "{{SERVER_NAME}}",
  "description": "Fully orchestrated Factorio Mega Factory hosted by -OZ- Hub.",
  "max_players": {{MAX_PLAYERS}},
  "visibility": { "public": true, "lan": true },
  "autosave_interval": 10,
  "autosave_slots": 5
}
